description: Evaluates whether API endpoint implementations match their specs

criteria.name: acceptance_criteria_coverage
criteria.description: Every acceptance criterion in the spec must have a corresponding implementation. Check each Given/When/Then statement and verify the code handles that exact scenario.
criteria.scoring: Count the acceptance criteria in the spec. For each one, determine if the code implements it (1) or not (0). Score = implemented / total.

criteria.name: api_contract_fidelity
criteria.description: The implemented endpoint must match the spec's API contract exactly: correct HTTP method, path, request body schema, response body schema, and status codes.
criteria.scoring: Check 5 elements: method, path, request schema, response schema, status codes. Score 0.2 for each correct element.

criteria.name: error_handling
criteria.description: All error cases defined in the spec must be handled with the correct HTTP status code and response format (RFC 7807 Problem Details).
criteria.scoring: For each error case in the spec, check: (a) is it handled? (b) correct status code? (c) Problem Details format? Score = correct_checks / (total_error_cases * 3)

criteria.name: no_hallucinated_dependencies
criteria.description: The code must not import modules, call functions, or reference APIs that do not exist in the project. Every import must resolve to a real file or installed package.
criteria.scoring: Binary: 1.0 if all imports and function calls reference real modules/packages, 0.0 if any hallucinated dependency is found.

criteria.name: type_safety
criteria.description: The code must use proper TypeScript types. No 'any' types, no type assertions without justification, all function parameters and return types annotated.
criteria.scoring: Count type violations: any usage, missing annotations, unsafe assertions. Score = max(0, 1.0 - (violations * 0.1))
